---
title: "test_freya_warden.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_freya_warden.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.63
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.03
---

## Intent
The `test_freya_warden.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_project, test_freya_warden_scan. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_project, test_freya_warden_scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.freya](file://src.sentinel.wardens.freya)

### Exports
- `mock_project`
- `test_freya_warden_scan`
